title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates:
Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates!
